title: zehneria liukiuensis
intro: Zehneria liukiuensis, also known as Ryukyu bitter cucumber or Ryukyu snake gourd, is a type of vining plant native to the Ryukyu Islands in Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Zehneria liukiuensis include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing digestive issues. Zehneria liukiuensis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves and stems in water, and it can also be used as a raw herb in salads and other dishes.
